category_sources: source_facts.description identifies a tool to download media content from DASH-MPEG or DASH-WebM MPD manifests.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dash-mpd-cli; source_facts.homepage uses the same project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project documentation site; source_facts.repo provides the official README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions DASH-MPEG, DASH-WebM, MPD manifests, and downloading media; source_facts.executables lists dash-mpd-cli.
